_search_results:
**Yes, the book exists.**

**Exact title:** *Psychology of Reasoning: Structure and Content* (also cited as *Psychology of reasoning; structure and content*).[1][2][3][4][5][6][7]

**Authors:** Peter Cathcart Wason (P. C. Wason) and Philip N. Johnson-Laird (P. N. Johnson-Laird).[1][2][3][4][5][6][7]

**Publisher and year:** Published in 1972 by Harvard University Press (Cambridge, Massachusetts) and also by Batsford (London).[1][3][4][5][6][7]

**Additional details:** 264 pages; ISBNs include 0-674-72126-8 (Harvard edition) and 0713409827 (Batsford hardcover edition).[1][4] No DOI available in sources; accessible via Internet Archive.[6]
